Program Two · Chair-Based Fitness

Sassy Seat

Chair-Based Fitness with Heart, Humor & Movement for Every Body 💜

A fun, uplifting chair-based fitness class designed to help seniors and individuals with mobility challenges stay active, strong, confident, and connected. No mat, no floor work — just great music, big smiles, and real results.

About the Class See the Benefits

✦ The Sassy Seat Class

⏱️
Class Length45–50 minutes of fun, full-body movement
💺
Chair-SupportedA chair provides stability — no floor work required
🎵
Music You'll LoveFamiliar, upbeat songs that feel like a celebration
🤝
Community FocusSing along, move together, share smiles
🌟
All Abilities WelcomeRegardless of age, fitness level, or mobility

"Movement should be accessible, meaningful, and fun for everyone."

💜 Strong. Confident. Connected. That's the Sassy Seat way! 💜

What's in Every Class?

Every Sassy Seat session is a full-body experience — carefully structured to warm you up, get your heart going, build real strength, and leave you feeling fantastic.

Class Structure Includes:

Gentle warm-up movements
Fun low-impact cardio
Strength and balance training
Stretching and flexibility work
Relaxing cool down and breath work

"More like a celebration than exercise!" 🎉

About Sassy Seat

Fitness for Every Body, Every Ability

Sassy Seat is a fun, uplifting chair-based fitness class designed to help seniors and individuals with mobility challenges stay active, strong, confident, and connected in a supportive environment where everyone is welcome.

Using a chair for stability and assistance, participants safely enjoy a full-body workout. Classes are set to familiar, upbeat music that participants know and love — creating an atmosphere that feels more like a celebration than exercise.

Singing along, moving together, and sharing smiles helps build confidence, reduce isolation, and foster meaningful social connection. Sassy Seat is about so much more than fitness — it's about belonging, dignity, and joy.

Silver Sneakers CertifiedNationally recognized senior fitness program
500+ Hour RYTExtensive yoga teacher training
AEA CertifiedAquatic Exercise Association instructor
Wellness BackgroundGroup fitness, hospitality & safety leadership

Why Sassy Seat?

Designed to Help You Thrive

💪

Strength & Mobility

Improve strength, mobility, flexibility, and balance safely using your chair for support.

❤️

Heart Health

Support heart health and circulation with fun, low-impact cardio that gets you moving.

🦋

Independence

Maintain independence and functional movement for everyday life activities and tasks.

😌

Less Discomfort

Reduce stiffness and joint discomfort through gentle, targeted movement and stretching.

⚡

Energy & Coordination

Increase daily energy levels and improve coordination with fun, rhythmic movement.

🧠

Cognitive Engagement

Enhance mood and cognitive engagement through music, rhythm, and mindful movement.

🌿

Stress Relief

Decrease stress and anxiety through mindful movement and calming breath work.

🤝

Social Connection

Encourage social interaction and build meaningful community connection with others.

T
Tami Kraeger

Your Instructor

Meet Tami Kraeger

Instructor Tami Kraeger brings warmth, encouragement, and extensive wellness experience to every class. Her passion is helping older adults and those with limited mobility continue to move their bodies with confidence, dignity, and joy while staying engaged with the community around them.

With a background in wellness, group fitness, hospitality, and safety leadership as a former flight attendant and business owner, Tami creates classes that are welcoming, safe, empowering, and genuinely enjoyable. Every class is filled with encouragement, positivity, and the belief that movement should be accessible, meaningful, and fun for everyone.

500+ Hr RYT Silver Sneakers AEA Aqua Fit Cosmic Kids Yoga Former Flight Attendant Business Owner

Join Us!

Ready to Get Sassy?

Contact Tami to find a Sassy Seat class near you, inquire about scheduling for your senior center, or learn more about bringing this program to your community.

Find a Class Near Me

Every body is welcome. Every pace is perfect. 💜
